title: Hapci
description: Makes your charachter sneeze tnt's randomly.
body:
Made for one of my random shorts on my channel. If you want to beat the game like this, here you go.

**Makes your charachter sneeze tnt's randomly lol.** _Thats it._

Tnt Sneeze. Bumm. Tnt go boom

My Channel: https://youtube.com/kattos
